ratesNote: Demo exchange rates, ready to connect to an external API.
bookingStatusIdle: Choose stay, guests and dates: these details stay synced with the future booking engine.
bookingStatusMissing: Select check-in and check-out to continue.
bookingStatusSent: Request ready: when iCal or a booking engine is connected, the same data will be used.
calendarHelp: The internal calendar checks dates, guests and selected stay.
calendarMissing: Select dates from the calendar to check availability.
availabilityIdle: Enter dates: the iCal calendar or booking engine will be able to read this request.
availabilityAvailable: Available: you can send the request to hold the stay.
availabilityUnavailable: Unavailable: try different dates or choose another stay.
availabilitySent: Request sent: you will receive confirmation and details.
messagePlaceholder: Tell us your preferred period and any special needs.
footerClaim: Boutique hospitality by the sea, nature and places to live slowly.
newsletterText: Receive travel ideas, exclusive offers and news from our stays.
